name: 公開身份揭露打臉
description: 在董事會上當眾揭露養女的真實出身（管家女兒），直接粉碎她在公司的地位。公開場合的揭露讓羞辱效果最大化，觀眾長期積累的對養女的厭惡在此刻得到釋放。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Registration date issued by adoption registry. Legally valid. Fu Yin Yin is the housekeeper's daughter. ... Speaking of hierarchy, the housekeeper's daughter status. You belong to the lowest rank.
